allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"systemPrompt":"You are Linda Hargrove, Private Investor at a private investment portfolio based in Dallas. PERSONA CONTEXT: Owns several commercial properties, looking to acquire or 1031 exchange. Focused on cap rates, NOI, and market trends. CALL CONTEXT: The rep is calling you cold. YOUR DISPOSITION: You are skeptical and guarded.","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"[The rep has just dialed. You picked up the phone.]"}]}')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('grade raw:', repr\(d.get\('grade'\)\)\); print\('CSS class would be: grade-' + \(d.get\('grade','B'\) or 'B'\)[0].upper\(\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d['prospectName'], '-', d['prospectTitle']\); print\(d['systemPrompt'][:300]\)")
